rankings.name: Old Park Star
key_positive_factors: Henderson-de Boinville yard record in this race
Arrives on a hat-trick of wins
key_risks: Short price in a high-variance race
Must prove ability to handle the Supreme's breakneck pace

rankings.name: Leader d'Allier
key_positive_factors: Paul Townend's choice for Willie Mullins
key_risks: Significant step up in class
Only two career runs to date

rankings.name: Mighty Park
key_positive_factors: High-class potential based on debut win
key_risks: Least experienced horse in the field
Likely to be hampered by a messy start

rankings.name: Talk The Talk
key_positive_factors: Proven Grade 1 capability from Joseph O'Brien's yard
key_risks: Recent fall raises jumping concerns at high speed

rankings.name: El Cairos
key_positive_factors: Jack Kennedy aboard for Gordon Elliott
key_risks: Can be finding the pace too hot early on
Inconsistent jumping profile

rankings.name: Sober Glory
key_positive_factors: Solid OR (144) suggests he is overpriced
key_risks: Yard form occasionally dips in March
May lack the 'gears' of the Irish challengers

rankings.name: Mydaddypaddy
key_risks: OR 139 leaves him with 12lb to find with the top
Better suited to a flatter track

rankings.name: Koktail Brut
key_risks: Recent form has tapered off significantly
Poor performance last time out

rankings.name: Eachtotheirown
key_positive_factors: Trainer Barry Connell knows how to win this race
Back to winning ways last time
key_risks: Struggled when previously upped to this level

rankings.name: Too Bossy For Us
key_positive_factors: Harry Cobden is an elite booking
key_risks: Rating of 131 is very low for a Supreme contender

rankings.name: Baron Noir
key_positive_factors: Alan King yard respects this race
key_risks: Looks outclassed on ratings
Lacks the speed for a true 2m G1

rankings.name: Sageborough
key_positive_factors: Has won a race this season
key_risks: Bottom rated
Soundly beaten last time out
Massive step up in class

tricast_top_3.combination: Old Park Star > Leader d'Allier > Mighty Park
Old Park Star > Mighty Park > Leader d'Allier
Leader d'Allier > Old Park Star > Mighty Park
